title: Wicked Big Meet
address: Stafford Motor Speedway, 55 West St, Stafford Springs, CT 06076
description: Join us for the world's largest Subaru enthusiast event! Experience a day filled with thrilling car showcases, exciting activities, and a vibrant community of Subaru lovers. Come meet the team!

title: Stars, Stripes, and Speed
address: Watkins Glen International, 2790 County Route 16, Watkins Glen, NY 14891
description: Stars, Stripes and Speed is an automotive experience unlike any other in the area. Taking place at World-Renowned Watkins Glen International the event features a huge car show, on track racing, drifting exhibition with ride-alongs, burnout competition, entertainment and contests, food trucks, specialty vendors, on-site camping and an after party with live concert!

title: Cars in the Park
address: Hickories Park, 359 Hickories Park Rd, Owego, NY 13827
description: The Cars in the Park meet in Owego is a massive, annual car show hosted by the Triple Cities Street Rods. The 2026 event will mark the 52nd year of the show, featuring hundreds of classic cars, hot rods, muscle cars, and a flea market.

title: Gridlife Summer Apex
address: Watkins Glen International, 2790 County Route 16, Watkins Glen, NY 14891
description: A cornerstone of the 2026 season, GRIDLIFE Summer Apex marks a long-awaited return to the legendary Watkins Glen International. For the first time since 2023, The Glen becomes home to three incredible days of high-energy racing, drifting, and live music to one of the most iconic circuits in North America.
